founder.title: Vipassana Teacher of Bodhi Dhammayan Tejachaisit
faq.q1: What is the difference between Samadhi and Vipassana?
faq.a1: Samadhi meditation trains the mind to stay focused on a single object. Vipassana is advanced insight meditation aimed at liberation from suffering.
faq.q2: Why practice at a temple or retreat center?
faq.a2: Practicing alone at home without a teacher lacks guidance and mental strength. Attending a retreat once a year helps you find the noble path.
faq.q3: Why practice meditation when it takes time from earning a living?
faq.a3: Meditation purifies the mind, frees it from defilements, and adds value to life.
faq.q4: What is the end of merit (หมดบุญ)?
faq.a4: We are born through the force of merit and demerit. Accumulating merit leads to a better foundation in life.
